title: Facet Not Searchable Despite Being Configured as Searchable
body:
### 🐛 Current behavior

I’m facing an issue where the facet "system_house" is not searchable, even though it is marked as searchable both in the Algolia Dashboard and in the application settings. When I search for any object present in this facet (e.g., "Timber"), no results are returned, and the search functionality does not behave as expected.

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/66692608-5adc-42a1-b5b3-15929e18006c) 

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d382b2c4-2d40-442c-8f47-5eabeed472a9) 

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b20c86bd-20e6-4c53-9203-53e3fd26adfc)

### 🔍 Steps to reproduce

1. Set up a sandbox environment where the issue can be observed. (https://codesandbox.io/p/sandbox/busy-cookies-t9h2dp).
2. Implement InstantSearch on the sandbox, including the "system_house" facet in the search configuration.
3. Type any value in the "search system house" present in the "system_house" facet (e.g., "Timber") into the facet search input.
4. Observe that no results are returned for the facet, despite it being configured as searchable in the dashboard and in the application.

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6e350de5-c603-492f-bdda-3c8c865a8a93)

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/da79d448-31f2-4b5c-b8ea-51af578db6e8)

### Live reproduction

https://codesandbox.io/p/sandbox/busy-cookies-t9h2dp

### 💭 Expected behavior

The facet "system_house" in the sandbox should be searchable, and users should be able to search that filter. 

### Package version

instantsearch 4.49.0

### Operating system

_No response_

### Browser

_No response_
